tagline: Pacoima's pork-shoulder royalty since the morning grill fires up.

hero.heading: Carnitas done right.
hero.subheading: Slow-cooked pork shoulder, crispy where it counts, served on hand-pressed tortillas. The Pacoima staple 804 reviews can't be wrong about.

about.heading: Real Mexican. Real slow. Real good.
paragraphs: Carnitas Loya has been Laurel Canyon's first stop for one thing since day one: pork shoulder simmered the right way — hours in copper, finished on the grill so the edges crisp up.
Three generations of hands shaping tortillas, chopping salsa, salting bistec. Pacoima's worst-kept secret, voted by every line out the door at noon.

services.title: Carnitas plate
services.description: Slow-cooked pork shoulder, crisped on the flat-top. Rice, beans, three tortillas, fresh salsa verde.

services.title: Tacos al pastor
services.description: Marinated pork on the trompo, fresh pineapple, cilantro, onion. The way your abuelita would approve.

services.title: Family carnitas (1lb)
services.description: One pound carnitas, twelve tortillas, salsas, rice & beans. Feeds 4 happy people.

services.title: Burritos
services.description: Hand-pressed, hand-rolled. Carnitas, asada, pollo, or veggie. As big as your forearm.

services.title: Tortas
services.description: Telera bread, refried beans, avocado, your meat. The lunch that ruins lunch.

services.title: Aguas frescas
services.description: Horchata, jamaica, tamarindo. Fresh every morning, sweet but never too sweet.

reviews.name: Miguel R.
reviews.text: The carnitas here are the gold standard. I've been coming since I was a kid. Crispy outside, juicy inside, salsa verde that hits perfect.

reviews.name: Yvette M.
reviews.text: Drove from Burbank for these tacos al pastor. Worth every minute of traffic. The trompo guy is an artist.

reviews.name: Carlos D.
reviews.text: Family-owned, family-run, and they treat you like family. Best burrito in the Valley, no debate.

reviews.name: Lupita S.
reviews.text: My abuela approves. That's the highest compliment I can give. Real Mexican food the right way.

contact.address: 10424 Laurel Canyon Blvd B, Pacoima, California
contact.mapEmbedQuery: Carnitas Loya 10424 Laurel Canyon Blvd Pacoima CA

seo.title: Carnitas Loya — Pacoima · Authentic Mexican Carnitas
seo.description: Pacoima's pork-shoulder royalty. Slow-cooked carnitas, tacos al pastor, hand-pressed tortillas on Laurel Canyon Blvd. 4.4★ · 804 reviews.
